one_time_description: Treaty Land Entitlement revenue recognized as part of settlement with Government of Canada, with distributions of $53,750,000 to adult members and $31,821,265 to minor members
economic_notes: Nation owns Doig River Cattle L.P., Doig River Aggregate L.P., Uujo Development L.P. (timber/contracting), Uujo Management G.P. Ltd., and 16.6% interest in Six Nations Ventures L.P. Community Development Trust established to manage Treaty Land Entitlement settlement funds. Cardinal Energy Ltd. shares held (370,340 common shares).
notes: Major one-time Treaty Land Entitlement settlement of $235,535,106 recognized in fiscal 2023, driving accumulated surplus from $32M to $194M. Distributions of $53.75M to adult members and $31.82M to minor members recorded as expenses. Community Development Trust portfolio investments grew dramatically to $155.4M due to settlement proceeds. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Six Nations Ventures L.P. 16.6%, Uujo Development L.P. 100%, Uujo Management G.P. Ltd. 100%). Four entities fully consolidated. ISC specific claim debt reduced from $6.24M to $577K. Trust distributions due to adult members of $18.89M on balance sheet represent uncollected distributions. Long-term debt note appears truncated in source document.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
